name: siftkit
description: Windows-first shell-output compression toolkit for Codex workflows.

scripts.test:live: npm run build && powershell -Command "$env:SIFTKIT_TEST_USE_EXISTING_SERVER='1'; if (-not $env:SIFTKIT_STATUS_BACKEND_URL) { $env:SIFTKIT_STATUS_BACKEND_URL='http://127.0.0.1:4765/status' }; if (-not $env:SIFTKIT_CONFIG_SERVICE_URL) { $env:SIFTKIT_CONFIG_SERVICE_URL='http://127.0.0.1:4765/config' }; node --test --test-name-pattern 'concurrent oversized CLI summary requests' .\tests\runtime.test.js"
